===[[Pokémon Sun and Pokémon Moon Special Demo Version]]===
In the Special Demo, Hau appears as part of the story. After the {{player}}, [[Elio (game)|Sun]], arrives in Hau'oli City, he introduces himself. In the Tourist Bureau, Sun's mother suggests that they take a look around the city's shopping district. Sun and Hau then get into a fight with Team Skull. After which, Hau directs the player to a [[Pokémon Center]] where he provides the player with a [[Super Potion]].

On Sunday nights, Hau will appear near the Malasada Shop.
